recommendations.title: Extraction
recommendations.overview: A hardened gun-for-hire's latest mission becomes a soul-searching race to survive when he's sent into Bangladesh to rescue a drug lord's kidnapped son.

recommendations.title: Extraction 2
recommendations.overview: Back from the brink of death, highly skilled commando Tyler Rake takes on another dangerous mission: saving the imprisoned family of a ruthless gangster.

recommendations.title: The Concorde... Airport '79
recommendations.overview: Aviation disaster-prone Joe Patroni must contend with nuclear missiles, the French Air Force and the threat of the plane splitting in two over the Alps.

recommendations.title: The Marksman
recommendations.overview: When Chechen rebels take over a Russian nuclear reactor, it’s up to a special ops marksman to rescue the hostages and prevent nuclear catastrophe.

recommendations.title: A House of Dynamite
recommendations.overview: When a single, unattributed missile is launched at the United States, a race begins to determine who is responsible and how to respond.

recommendations.title: Miracle Mile
recommendations.genres: Romance, Drama, Science Fiction, Thriller, Comedy, Action

recommendations.title: The Spy Who Loved Me
recommendations.overview: Russian and British submarines with nuclear missiles on board both vanish from sight without a trace. England and Russia both blame each other as James Bond tries to solve the riddle of the disappearing ships. But the KGB also has an agent on the cas

recommendations.title: Thirteen Days
recommendations.overview: The story of the Cuban Missile Crisis in 1962—the nuclear standoff with the USSR sparked by the discovery by the Americans of missile bases established on the Soviet-allied island of Cuba.

recommendations.title: Ultimate Avengers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Family, Adventure, Science Fiction

recommendations.director: Bob Richardson, Curt Geda, Steven E. Gordon

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.
